subject: FBO fuel purchases
body:
I spoke with Eric, the owner of Executive Jet about the fuel  purchase at 
cost that you mentioned for FBO owners.  He is not aware of any  organized group 
that performs that service, but said he would look into and get  back with me 
next Tuesday.  He did say that it might be possible to  work out such a plan 
on a one on one basis with other FBO's.  If the FBO  had charter airplanes that 
visited your FBO, then it might very well be possible  to do.



**************Vote for your city's best dining and nightlife. City's Best 
2008.      (http://citysbest.aol.com?ncid=aolacg00050000000102)
body_html:
I spoke with Eric, the owner of Executive Jet about the fuel purchase at cost that you mentioned for FBO owners.  He is not aware of any organized group that performs that service, but said he would look into and get back with me next Tuesday.  He did say that it might be possible to work out such a plan on a one on one basis with other FBO's.  If the FBO had charter airplanes that visited your FBO, then it might very well be possible to do.



Vote for your city's best dining and nightlife. City's Best 2008.
